queries.query_text: How long do employees have to submit travel expenses after a trip?
relevant_docs: Employees must submit travel expenses within 30 days of trip completion.

queries.query_text: Does a flight above 500 dollars need manager approval before booking?
relevant_docs: Flights above 500 dollars require manager approval before booking business travel.

queries.query_text: What approval and hotel reimbursement limits apply to business travel?
relevant_docs: Flights above 500 dollars require manager approval before booking business travel.
Hotel reimbursement is capped at 180 dollars per night unless finance approves an exception.

queries.query_text: How fast must urgent support tickets receive a first response?
relevant_docs: Urgent support tickets must receive a first response within 1 hour.

documents.text: Employees must submit travel expenses within 30 days of trip completion.
Flights above 500 dollars require manager approval before booking business travel.
Hotel reimbursement is capped at 180 dollars per night unless finance approves an exception.
Meal receipts are required when a single charge exceeds 25 dollars.
Expense reports missing receipts are returned to the employee for correction.
Production API keys must be rotated every 90 days.
Security incidents must be reported in the on-call Slack channel within 15 minutes.
Urgent support tickets must receive a first response within 1 hour.
